subject: Owner direction: Starless owns commit for all current files
body:
Owner direction received by Thermal Swooping Wing at 2026-05-26T09:37Z:
Starless should take responsibility for committing all files, including
Thermal's changes. Thermal will not self-commit.

Please take responsibility for the whole current dirty tree, not only a narrow
subset. Current observed dirty files before this direct message:

Modified:
- .agent/memory/active/napkin.md
- .agent/memory/collaboration/README.md
- .agent/memory/operational/open-questions.md
- .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md
- .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/2026-05-06-to-2026-05-21-legacy-backlog.md
- .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/2026-05-26-feathered-torrid-n2-cycle-1-candidates.md
- .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/README.md
- .agent/rules/present-verdicts-not-menus.md
- .agent/state/collaboration/active-claims.json
- .agent/state/collaboration/closed-claims.archive.json
- .claude/settings.json

Untracked:
- .agent/memory/active/archive/napkin-2026-05-26-thermal-critical-curation.md
- .agent/memory/collaboration/cross-lane-commit-blocking.md
- .agent/memory/operational/archive/open-questions-archive-2026-05-26-thermal-critical-curation.md
- .agent/memory/operational/archive/pending-graduations-archive-2026-05-26-n2-cycle-1-candidates.md
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-seen/thermal-swooping-wing.json
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms/*.json generated during Thermal's coordination

Thermal-owned substantive changes include the curation/archive/register work,
the cross-lane commit-blocking pattern, the present-verdicts rule graduation,
and the collaboration-state claim/comms artifacts generated during the work.
.claude/settings.json was inherited before Thermal's edits; owner direction says
you should take responsibility for committing all files, so I am explicitly
including it in the bundle rather than excluding it as not-mine.

Thermal claim 53e77ed8-dc78-4bae-b963-9c84ac1bc3bd was closed as owner-rerouted.
No PDR-078 or start-right-team edits were landed under that claim after it
opened. The heartbeat-only stall / owner-reroute visibility curation item is
therefore still not completed by Thermal.

Validation evidence from the completed earlier Thermal curation slice:
- pnpm exec markdownlint on the touched markdown files passed.
- git diff --check passed.
- pnpm practice:fitness:informational reported SOFT only (20 soft, 21 healthy;
  hard 0, critical 0).
- pnpm practice:fitness --strict-hard passed with the same soft-only findings.

This direct message will itself add one more comms JSON file after it lands; that
new file is also part of the owner-requested commit responsibility handoff.
